problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Combining Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
